Notes.Text:
This update for gstreamer-plugins-bad fixes the following issue

- CVE-2026-52719: gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: GStreamer: Out-of-bounds read via JPEG segment length validation in VA
  decoder (bsc#1268401).
Notes.Title: Details

Vulnerabilities.Description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability was found in the VA JPEG decoder in GStreamer's gst-plugins-bad. The JPEG parser reads a segment length value from the bitstream without validating it against available data. A remote attacker could trick a user into opening a specially crafted JPEG file, causing downstream parsing to read beyond the provided input buffer, leading to a crash or potential information disclosure.
